description_long: This motorcycle features a classic cruiser design with a low-slung frame, wide seat, and prominent V-twin engine. The body is predominantly dark gray with metallic accents, and the exhaust pipes are large and extend along the right side. The handlebars are wide and slightly raised, providing a comfortable, upright riding posture. Both wheels are covered with partial fenders, and the rear section includes dual exhaust outlets and a small rear light. Subtle orange detailing is visible on the side panels, adding a touch of color to the otherwise monochrome palette. The overall build suggests a robust, heavy-duty construction typical of urban and highway motorcycles.
description: A dark gray cruiser-style motorcycle with wide handlebars, large exhaust pipes, and subtle orange side detailing. The design is robust and classic, suitable for urban and highway use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the V-twin engine, wide seat, and large exhaust pipe on the right side.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the dual exhaust outlets, rear fender, and taillight assembly.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the left wheel, engine, and seat profile with visible orange detailing.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the wide handlebars, front fender, and headlight area.
